prompt: High-end magazine cover style presentation slide. Background: soft beige-white gradient (#f8f8f5 to #f0f0eb). Center: large high-quality four-panel collage showcasing representative landscapes of the four seasons. Each season occupies one quadrant: top-left - spring cherry blossom mountains; top-right - summer sunny beach with palm trees; bottom-left - autumn golden maple forest; bottom-right - winter snow-covered pine trees and mountains. Collage has thin white borders. Top: large elegant serif font title '四季之美' (The Beauty of Four Seasons). Bottom: smaller sans-serif subtitle '自然的循环与韵律' (The Cycle and Rhythm of Nature). Overall layout is clean with ample negative space. Editorial-grade photography quality, natural lighting, true-to-life saturated colors.
style: editorial magazine cover, Vogue/National Geographic aesthetic, high-end presentation slide, minimal design, elegant typography
composition: Symmetrical four-panel collage centered on slide with ample negative space around. Title at top with generous margin, subtitle at bottom. Clean grid layout with precise alignment. Each season quadrant shows representative landscape photograph with consistent framing.
color_palette: Soft beige gradient background #f8f8f5 to #f0f0eb. Spring quadrant: soft pinks, fresh greens, light blues. Summer quadrant: saturated blues, golden yellows, palm tree greens. Autumn quadrant: warm golds, oranges, deep reds, browns. Winter quadrant: cool whites, gray-blues, dark greens. Thin white borders #ffffff. Text in charcoal gray #2d2d2d.
typography: Large elegant serif font for title (Playfair Display style, 96pt weight, charcoal gray #2d2d2d). Smaller sans-serif font for subtitle (Söhne style, 24pt weight, charcoal gray #2d2d2d). Clean, legible type with generous line spacing (1.6).
lighting: Natural, soft ambient lighting as in professional magazine photography. Each quadrant has appropriate seasonal lighting: spring - soft morning light; summer - bright sunny light; autumn - golden hour diffused light; winter - soft overcast winter light.
visual_quality: Editorial-grade photography, high resolution, sharp details, natural color grading, professional presentation slide. Each seasonal image is National Geographic-level landscape photography.
negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, amateur photography, oversaturated colors, artificial lighting, digital art, illustration, cartoon, 3D render, cluttered design, busy background, text overlay covering images, poor composition, inconsistent lighting across quadrants
